diagrams.title: Addressing Modes
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the different types of addressing modes in computer architecture.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the different types of addressing modes and their relationships.

diagrams.title: Immediate Addressing
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the process of Immediate Addressing.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the process of Immediate Addressing and how it accesses memory.

diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the process of Indirect Addressing and how it accesses memory.

diagrams.title: Register Addressing
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the process of Register Addressing.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the process of Register Addressing and how it accesses memory.

diagrams.description: A diagram showing the process of Indexed Addressing.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the process of Indexed Addressing and how it accesses memory.
